parameters.command:
echo '=== DOCKER STATUS ==='
docker ps --format "automation-01|{{.Names}}|{{.Status}}" || true
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=5 10.0.0.33 'docker ps --format "docker-01|{{.Names}}|{{.Status}}"' || echo "docker-01|OFFLINE"
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=5 10.0.0.35 'docker ps --format "colmado-db|{{.Names}}|{{.Status}}"' || echo "colmado-db|OFFLINE"
echo '=== DISK USAGE ==='
echo '=== automation-01 ==='
df -h /
echo '=== docker-01 ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=5 10.0.0.33 'df -h /' || echo 'OFFLINE'
echo '=== colmado-db ==='
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=5 10.0.0.35 'df -h /' || echo 'OFFLINE'

DATA_BACKUP=$(ls -1t /opt/backups/nextcloud/data/nextcloud-data-*.tar.gz 2>/dev/null | head -1); DB_BACKUP=$(ls -1t /opt/backups/nextcloud/db/nextcloud-db-*.sql.gz 2>/dev/null | head -1); HTML_BACKUP=$(ls -1t /opt/backups/nextcloud/html/nextcloud-html-*.tar.gz 2>/dev/null | head -1); printf "HOST=%s
" "$(hostname)"; printf "DATE=%s
" "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')"; printf "DATA_BACKUP=%s
" "$DATA_BACKUP"; printf "DB_BACKUP=%s
" "$DB_BACKUP"; printf "HTML_BACKUP=%s
" "$HTML_BACKUP"; printf "DATA_SIZE=%s
" "$(ls -lh "$DATA_BACKUP" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $5}')"; printf "DB_SIZE=%s
" "$(ls -lh "$DB_BACKUP" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $5}')"; printf "HTML_SIZE=%s
" "$(ls -lh "$HTML_BACKUP" 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $5}')"; printf "SUCCESS_LOG=%s
" "$(tail -50 /var/log/nextcloud-backup.log 2>/dev/null | grep -c 'Nextcloud backup completed successfully')"

BACKUP_DIR="/mnt/usb-drive/proxmox-backups/dump"; LATEST_BACKUP=$(find "$BACKUP_DIR" -type f \( -name '*.vma.zst' -o -name '*.vma.gz' \) -printf '%T@ %p
' 2>/dev/null | sort -nr | head -1 | cut -d' ' -f2-); LATEST_BACKUP_TIME=$(find "$BACKUP_DIR" -type f \( -name '*.vma.zst' -o -name '*.vma.gz' \) -printf '%TY-%Tm-%Td %TH:%TM %p
' 2>/dev/null | sort -r | head -1); printf "HOST=%s
" "$(hostname)"; printf "DATE=%s
" "$(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S')"; printf "USB_MOUNT=%s
" "$(findmnt -n /mnt/usb-drive >/dev/null && echo 1 || echo 0)"; printf "USB_DISK=%s
" "$(df -h /mnt/usb-drive 2>/dev/null | awk 'NR==2 {print $2,$3,$4,$5}')"; printf "LATEST_BACKUP=%s
" "$LATEST_BACKUP"; printf "LATEST_BACKUP_TIME=%s
" "$LATEST_BACKUP_TIME"; printf "BACKUP_COUNT_24H=%s
" "$(find "$BACKUP_DIR" -type f \( -name '*.vma.zst' -o -name '*.vma.gz' \) -mtime -1 2>/dev/null | wc -l)"; printf "TOTAL_BACKUPS=%s
" "$(find "$BACKUP_DIR" -type f \( -name '*.vma.zst' -o -name '*.vma.gz' \) 2>/dev/null | wc -l)"
